creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 229111
Patch for libtorrent-rasterbar

Update libtorrent-rasterbar to 1.2.14

Compile and run-time tested on FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #1 stable/13-n247248-fc1b69d0311 (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Notes:
SSL test fails due to broken certificates as far as I can tell, this is also true for 1.2.13
